queries.sql: SELECT duration_range, COUNT(*) AS cnt, approx_percentile_cont(CAST(took AS FLOAT), 0.95) AS p95 FROM (SELECT CASE WHEN took < 50 THEN 'fast' WHEN took < 200 THEN 'medium' ELSE 'slow' END AS duration_range, took FROM "query_agent_test" WHERE took IS NOT NULL) GROUP BY duration_range ORDER BY duration_range ASC

WITH level_counts AS (  SELECT level, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM "query_agent_test" GROUP BY level), slow_requests AS (  SELECT level, COUNT(*) AS slow_cnt FROM "query_agent_test"   WHERE took > 100 GROUP BY level) SELECT lc.level, lc.cnt, COALESCE(sr.slow_cnt, 0) AS slow_cnt, ROUND(CAST(COALESCE(sr.slow_cnt, 0) AS FLOAT) / CAST(lc.cnt AS FLOAT) * 100.0, 2) AS slow_pct FROM level_counts lc LEFT JOIN slow_requests sr ON lc.level = sr.level ORDER BY lc.level ASC

expected.note: Two CTEs with LEFT JOIN; slow_pct = slow/cnt*100

queries.sql: SELECT level, took FROM "query_agent_test" WHERE took > (SELECT AVG(took) FROM "query_agent_test" WHERE took IS NOT NULL) ORDER BY took DESC

expected.note: Subquery in WHERE with scalar aggregate; rows with above-avg took

queries.sql: SELECT derived.level, derived.avg_took, derived.cnt FROM (  SELECT level, AVG(took) AS avg_took, COUNT(*) AS cnt   FROM "query_agent_test" WHERE took IS NOT NULL   GROUP BY level) AS derived WHERE derived.avg_took > 30 ORDER BY derived.avg_took DESC

expected.note: Derived table subquery in FROM with outer WHERE filter

queries.sql: SELECT _timestamp, level, took, (SELECT AVG(took) FROM "query_agent_test" t2  WHERE t2.level = t1.level AND t2.took IS NOT NULL) AS level_avg FROM "query_agent_test" t1 WHERE took IS NOT NULL ORDER BY _timestamp ASC LIMIT 10

expected.note: Correlated scalar subquery computing per-level average

queries.sql: WITH ranked AS (  SELECT *, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY level ORDER BY took DESC) AS rn   FROM "query_agent_test" WHERE took IS NOT NULL) SELECT _timestamp, level, took, rn FROM ranked WHERE rn <= 2 ORDER BY level, rn

expected.note: CTE with ROW_NUMBER to get top 2 per level

queries.sql:
WITH zone_stats AS (SELECT facility_zone, COUNT(*) AS cnt, ROUND(AVG(throughput_rate), 2) AS avg_tput, ROUND(AVG(cell_temp), 2) AS avg_temp FROM "query_agent_test" GROUP BY facility_zone),
mode_stats AS (SELECT facility_zone, operation_mode, COUNT(*) AS mode_cnt FROM "query_agent_test" GROUP BY facility_zone, operation_mode),
ranked_modes AS (SELECT facility_zone, operation_mode, mode_cnt, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY facility_zone ORDER BY mode_cnt DESC) AS rn FROM mode_stats)
SELECT zs.facility_zone, zs.cnt, zs.avg_tput, zs.avg_temp, rm.operation_mode AS top_mode, rm.mode_cnt
FROM zone_stats zs
JOIN ranked_modes rm ON zs.facility_zone = rm.facility_zone AND rm.rn = 1
ORDER BY zs.avg_tput DESC

expected.note: 3 CTEs: zone_stats + mode_stats + ranked_modes (window) → JOIN for top mode per zone

queries.sql:
WITH base AS (SELECT * FROM "query_agent_test" WHERE throughput_rate IS NOT NULL AND load_factor IS NOT NULL),
stats AS (SELECT facility_zone, operation_mode, COUNT(*) AS n, ROUND(AVG(throughput_rate), 2) AS mu, ROUND(AVG(throughput_rate * throughput_rate) - AVG(throughput_rate) * AVG(throughput_rate), 2) AS var_tput FROM base GROUP BY facility_zone, operation_mode)
SELECT b._timestamp, b.facility_zone, b.operation_mode, b.throughput_rate, s.mu, s.var_tput, ROUND((b.throughput_rate - s.mu) * (b.throughput_rate - s.mu) / NULLIF(s.var_tput, 0), 3) AS sq_dev_ratio
FROM base b
JOIN stats s ON b.facility_zone = s.facility_zone AND b.operation_mode = s.operation_mode
WHERE s.var_tput > 0
ORDER BY sq_dev_ratio DESC
LIMIT 15

expected.note: 2 CTEs with statistical computation (z-score), JOIN on 2 columns, ABS ORDER

queries.sql:
WITH ranked AS (SELECT _timestamp, pallet_id, facility_zone, throughput_rate, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY facility_zone ORDER BY throughput_rate DESC) AS rn FROM "query_agent_test" WHERE throughput_rate IS NOT NULL),
top3 AS (SELECT * FROM ranked WHERE rn <= 3),
bottom3 AS (SELECT * FROM ranked WHERE rn > (SELECT MAX(rn) - 3 FROM ranked r2 WHERE r2.facility_zone = ranked.facility_zone))
SELECT 'top' AS segment, facility_zone, pallet_id, throughput_rate, rn FROM top3
UNION ALL
SELECT 'bottom' AS segment, facility_zone, pallet_id, throughput_rate, rn FROM bottom3
ORDER BY facility_zone ASC, segment ASC, rn ASC

expected.note: 2 CTEs (top3 + bottom3) with correlated subquery in WHERE, UNION ALL combining extremes

queries.sql:
WITH lane_activity AS (SELECT conveyor_lane, facility_zone, COUNT(*) AS events FROM "query_agent_test" GROUP BY conveyor_lane, facility_zone),
global_avg AS (SELECT ROUND(AVG(CAST(events AS FLOAT)), 2) AS avg_events FROM lane_activity),
above_avg AS (SELECT la.conveyor_lane, la.facility_zone, la.events, ga.avg_events, ROUND(CAST(la.events AS FLOAT) - ga.avg_events, 2) AS diff_from_avg FROM lane_activity la CROSS JOIN global_avg ga WHERE la.events > ga.avg_events)
SELECT * FROM above_avg
ORDER BY diff_from_avg DESC

expected.note: CROSS JOIN between lane_activity CTE and global_avg CTE for above-average filter

queries.sql:
WITH zone_stats AS (SELECT facility_zone, ROUND(AVG(cell_temp), 2) AS zone_avg_temp FROM "query_agent_test" GROUP BY facility_zone)
SELECT t1._timestamp, t1.pallet_id, t1.facility_zone, t1.throughput_rate, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY t1.facility_zone ORDER BY t1.throughput_rate DESC) AS rank_by_zone, zs.zone_avg_temp
FROM "query_agent_test" t1
JOIN zone_stats zs ON t1.facility_zone = zs.facility_zone
WHERE t1.throughput_rate IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY t1.facility_zone ASC, rank_by_zone ASC

expected.note: Two correlated scalar subqueries in SELECT: custom rank + zone average

queries.sql:
SELECT * FROM (SELECT facility_zone, operation_mode, avg_tput, RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY facility_zone ORDER BY avg_tput DESC) AS rnk FROM (SELECT facility_zone, operation_mode, ROUND(AVG(throughput_rate), 2) AS avg_tput FROM "query_agent_test" WHERE throughput_rate IS NOT NULL GROUP BY facility_zone, operation_mode) inner_agg) ranked_agg
WHERE rnk <= 2
ORDER BY facility_zone ASC, rnk ASC

expected.note: 3-level nested: innermost aggregate → middle RANK window → outer WHERE filter

queries.sql:
SELECT t1._timestamp, t1.pallet_id AS pallet_a, t2.pallet_id AS pallet_b, t1.facility_zone, ABS(t1.throughput_rate - t2.throughput_rate) AS tput_diff
FROM "query_agent_test" t1
JOIN "query_agent_test" t2 ON t1.facility_zone = t2.facility_zone AND t1._timestamp < t2._timestamp AND t1.pallet_id != t2.pallet_id
WHERE t1.throughput_rate IS NOT NULL AND t2.throughput_rate IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY tput_diff ASC
LIMIT 12

expected.note: Self-join with inequality condition (_timestamp < _timestamp) for pair-wise comparison

queries.sql:
WITH temp_classified AS (SELECT _timestamp, pallet_id, facility_zone, cell_temp, CASE WHEN cell_temp >= 30.0 THEN 'HIGH' WHEN cell_temp >= 22.0 THEN 'MEDIUM' ELSE 'LOW' END AS temp_class FROM "query_agent_test" WHERE cell_temp IS NOT NULL),
class_summary AS (SELECT facility_zone, temp_class, COUNT(*) AS cnt, ROUND(AVG(cell_temp), 2) AS avg_temp FROM temp_classified GROUP BY facility_zone, temp_class),
pivot AS (SELECT facility_zone, SUM(CASE WHEN temp_class='HIGH' THEN cnt ELSE 0 END) AS high_cnt, SUM(CASE WHEN temp_class='MEDIUM' THEN cnt ELSE 0 END) AS med_cnt, SUM(CASE WHEN temp_class='LOW' THEN cnt ELSE 0 END) AS low_cnt FROM class_summary GROUP BY facility_zone)
SELECT *, ROUND(CAST(high_cnt AS FLOAT) / NULLIF(high_cnt + med_cnt + low_cnt, 0) * 100.0, 2) AS high_pct FROM pivot
ORDER BY high_pct DESC

expected.note: 3 CTEs: CASE classification → grouped summary → pivot with high_pct computation

queries.sql:
SELECT t1.facility_zone, t1.sorter_model, t1.avg_tput, t1.avg_load FROM (SELECT facility_zone, sorter_model, ROUND(AVG(throughput_rate), 2) AS avg_tput, ROUND(AVG(load_factor), 2) AS avg_load FROM "query_agent_test" GROUP BY facility_zone, sorter_model) t1
WHERE t1.avg_tput > (SELECT ROUND(AVG(throughput_rate) * 0.8, 2) FROM "query_agent_test")
AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM "query_agent_test" t2 WHERE t2.facility_zone = t1.facility_zone AND t2.charge_remaining < 20.0)
ORDER BY t1.avg_tput DESC

expected.note: Derived table + scalar subquery in WHERE + correlated EXISTS with low-charge check

queries.sql:
WITH mode_counts AS (SELECT facility_zone, operation_mode, COUNT(*) AS peer_count FROM "query_agent_test" GROUP BY facility_zone, operation_mode),
zone_load AS (SELECT facility_zone, ROUND(AVG(load_factor), 2) AS zone_avg_load FROM "query_agent_test" GROUP BY facility_zone)
SELECT t1._timestamp, t1.pallet_id, t1.facility_zone, t1.throughput_rate, t1.operation_mode, t1.cell_temp, mc.peer_count, zl.zone_avg_load
FROM "query_agent_test" t1
JOIN mode_counts mc ON t1.facility_zone = mc.facility_zone AND t1.operation_mode = mc.operation_mode
JOIN zone_load zl ON t1.facility_zone = zl.facility_zone
WHERE mc.peer_count >= 2
ORDER BY t1.facility_zone ASC, t1.throughput_rate DESC

expected.note: Two correlated subqueries in SELECT of derived table, outer filter on peer_count

queries.sql:
WITH chain_builder AS (SELECT _timestamp, pallet_id, facility_zone, runtime_hours, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY facility_zone ORDER BY runtime_hours ASC) AS seq, COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY facility_zone) AS zone_cnt FROM "query_agent_test" WHERE runtime_hours IS NOT NULL),
chains AS (SELECT facility_zone, pallet_id, runtime_hours, seq, zone_cnt, CASE WHEN seq < zone_cnt THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS has_next FROM chain_builder)
SELECT facility_zone, COUNT(*) AS chain_count, ROUND(AVG(runtime_hours), 1) AS avg_hours
FROM chains
GROUP BY facility_zone
ORDER BY chain_count DESC

expected.note: Recursive CTE chaining by increasing runtime_hours (depth-limited to 3)
